brand.name: Academorix
brand.voice: Confident, precise, and warm. Speaks like a senior academy director who happens to love shipping software: bold on outcomes, quiet on itself.
principles: Show, don't tell. Every screen leads with the operator's job, not the marketing pitch.
One command center. Nothing lives in more than one place; scope switches the view.
Sport-agnostic by default. Terminology adapts per tenant — swimming, gymnastics, soccer, tennis, athletics, martial arts.
Accessible by construction. WCAG 2.2 AA, keyboard-first, RTL-first.

palette.notes: The glass family uses HeroUI Pro glassmorphism with a lime-green accent. The academorix family layers a chartreuse identity (oklch(0.87 0.212 132)) plus a Spectral serif for editorial surfaces. Themes are selected at runtime via data-theme on <html>.
